first_run.rationale: The scores are identical, and the justifications, strengths, and concerns are substantively the same, with only minor variations in wording and emphasis. The changes fall within the expected range of run-to-run noise and do not reflect any meaningful shift in the evaluation of the candidate's qualifications based on the location change. The core assessment of the candidate's fit remains unchanged.
